issues.description: BDD oracle executed zero scenarios (scenarios_attempted = 0). The tagged scenario 'test_after_a_run_every_published_episode_is_accounted_for_as_ingested_or_deadlettered' is pending with a traceback. Per ZERO-CARDINALITY BDD GUARD: absent signal is not evidence of success.
issues.suggestion: Investigate the BDD scenario failure. Run with --full-trace to see the complete traceback. Ensure the scenario can execute successfully against the implementation. The unit tests pass, but end-to-end behavioral verification is required.

issues.description: 13 honesty discrepancies (should_fix): Player claimed files in files_modified that git status shows as unmodified this turn. Files include: .claude/task-plans/*.md, .guardkit/bdd/*.xml, coverage_task_rip_007.json, src/fleet_memory/reindex/*.py, tests/unit/reindex/*.py
issues.suggestion: In files_modified, only list files actually modified in THIS turn. Orchestrator-managed paths (.guardkit/autobuild/, .guardkit/bdd/, coverage_*.json) should never appear in files_modified. If delegating via task-work without direct edits, files_modified should be empty or contain only the files you personally touched.

criteria_verification.notes: Unit test evidence confirms audit_published_episodes() reconciles episodes via store lookup and DLQ check. test_all_stored_reports_100_percent and test_dlq_episode_counts_as_accounted verify this behavior.
Unit tests demonstrate classification logic: episodes checked against store first, then DLQ. Tracked in stored_count and dlq_count fields.

test_missing_record_reported_unaccounted verifies that unaccounted episodes are tracked in unaccounted_episodes list and unaccounted_count. The is_100_percent_accounted property returns False when unaccounted_count > 0.

Unit test test_all_stored_reports_100_percent verifies the property works correctly, BUT the BDD oracle scenario 'test_after_a_run_every_published_episode_is_accounted_for_as_ingested_or_deadlettered' is pending with traceback (0 scenarios executed). Missing end-to-end behavioral verification of a clean full-corpus run.

All three required test cases present and passing in tests/unit/reindex/test_audit.py: test_all_stored_reports_100_percent (all stored → 100%), test_dlq_episode_counts_as_accounted (DLQ → accounted), test_missing_record_reported_unaccounted (missing → unaccounted).
Evidence indicates ruff check and ruff format pass with zero errors. Independent test run completed successfully, suggesting no lint violations.

rationale: Cannot approve due to BDD oracle ABSENT SIGNAL (zero scenarios executed, 1 pending with traceback). Per ZERO-CARDINALITY BDD GUARD: absence of failure is not evidence of success. Unit tests provide strong coverage of the audit logic (14 tests passing), but the end-to-end BDD scenario must complete successfully to verify the full pipeline integration. Secondary issue: 13 honesty discrepancies from incorrect files_modified tracking (should_fix severity).
